title: Singleton (view) table problem
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL);
CREATE VIEW count_view AS SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE another_table (value DECIMAL(10, 2), description TEXT NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Creating view from count query on tables
